name: shared-aleph-tooling
description: Shared Aleph VM deployment, rootfs, and automation tooling monorepo.

scripts.build:publishable: pnpm --filter @shared-aleph/shared-types run build:publish && pnpm --filter @shared-aleph/core run build:publish && pnpm --filter @shared-aleph/node run build:publish
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @shared-aleph/core test && pnpm --filter @shared-aleph/shared-types test && pnpm --filter @shared-aleph/node test
